name: Tamatem Arab World Mobile Gaming Payment API
what_it_does: Tamatem Arab World mobile gaming and payment REST API for game developers targeting Arabic-speaking markets to integrate Arabic-localized in-app purchase flows, local MENA payment methods (STC Pay, Fawry, wallet payments, carrier billing), and Arabic RTL interface support — enabling game publishers to monetize Arabic-speaking mobile gamers across Saudi Arabia, Egypt, UAE, Jordan, Iraq, and other Arab markets through Tamatem's MENA gaming publisher and payment infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage in-app purchase for Arab market game monetization automation, handle local payment for MENA gaming payment method integration automation, access carrier billing for Arab mobile operator payment automation, retrieve purchase verification for game item delivery automation, manage refund for Arab gaming payment reversal automation, handle currency conversion for Arab market pricing automation, access player wallet for gaming credit management automation, retrieve analytics for Arab gaming revenue reporting automation, manage subscription for gaming pass billing automation, and integrate Tamatem with Arab market mobile games for localized gaming payment automation.
use_cases: Integrating local MENA payment methods (STC Pay, Fawry, carrier billing) for Arab mobile game monetization automation agents
Processing Arabic-localized in-app purchase flows for game item and virtual currency sales automation agents
Managing carrier billing for Arab market mobile gamer micropayment collection automation agents
Handling Arab market game subscription and battle pass payment processing for gaming platform automation agents
not_for: Non-Arab markets (Tamatem focuses on Arabic-speaking MENA markets)
Non-gaming applications (Tamatem's payment infrastructure is gaming-specific)
Large enterprise SaaS payment (Tamatem targets mobile game developers)
best_when: A mobile game developer wanting AI agents to monetize Arabic-speaking players across MENA through Tamatem's localized payment infrastructure with STC Pay, Fawry, carrier billing, and other Arab-market payment methods.
avoid_when: PUBLISHER PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: Tamatem gaming payment API requires partnership with Tamatem as publishing partner; automated independent developer API access assumption creates no access; automated must establish Tamatem publishing or payment partnership. ARABIC LOCALIZATION IS MANDATORY: Tamatem serves Arab gamers who expect Arabic RTL interface; automated English-only checkout assumption creates poor Arab market conversion; automated must implement Arabic RTL payment UI for Arab gamer audience. CARRIER BILLING VARIES BY COUNTRY: Mobile carrier billing availability and rates differ per Arab country (STC, Zain, Mobily, Etisalat, etc.); automated uniform carrier billing assumption creates carrier_not_available in some markets; automated must check carrier availability per Arab country. CONTENT CULTURAL COMPLIANCE: Arab gaming market has cultural and regulatory sensitivities; automated non-compliant game content assumption creates distribution issues in Saudi Arabia and other Arab markets.

auth.notes: Tamatem uses API key for publisher authentication. REST API with JSON. Amman, Jordan HQ. Founded 2013 by Hussam Hammo. Products: Arab market game publishing, Arabic localization, local payment integration (STC Pay, Fawry, Vodafone Cash, carrier billing), in-app purchase, player analytics. SDKs: Unity, Android, iOS. Arab gaming publisher serving 15M+ Arab gamers. Backed by investors including MEVP. Competes with GamePower7 for Arab gaming market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Integration sandbox for approved publishers; production requires Tamatem partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share on game sales; publishing partnership fee structure; custom enterprise deals
pricing.notes: Amman JO. Arab gaming publisher. Revenue share model. 15M+ Arab gamers. MENA gaming focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; purchase verification and analytics APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: PUBLISHER PARTNERSHIP IS PREREQUISITE: Tamatem payment API requires formal publishing partnership; automated developer self-service assumption creates no API access; automated must establish Tamatem partnership agreement before integration

ARABIC RTL INTERFACE REQUIRED: Arab gamer audience expects Arabic right-to-left payment UI; automated LTR-only payment UI assumption creates poor conversion and cultural disconnect; automated must implement Arabic RTL localization for Arab market checkout

CARRIER BILLING IS COUNTRY-SPECIFIC: Mobile carrier billing availability varies by Arab country (STC in Saudi, Zain in Kuwait/Jordan/Iraq, Mobily in Saudi, Etisalat/e& in UAE); automated uniform carrier coverage assumption creates carrier_not_available; automated must verify carrier billing availability per target Arab country

PURCHASE VERIFICATION IS SERVER-SIDE: Game item delivery should only happen after server-side purchase verification webhook; automated client-side verification trust assumption creates item delivery without confirmed payment; automated must verify purchase server-side before granting game items

CONTENT RATING AFFECTS DISTRIBUTION: Arab markets (especially Saudi Arabia) have content compliance requirements; automated unrestricted content distribution assumption creates platform rejection; automated game publishers must comply with Arab market content guidelines
agent_readiness.security_notes: Arab gaming payments. SAMA, CBE, CBUAE. API key. Arab MENA markets. Gaming payment and player data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Arab gaming payments. MENA regulations. API key. Arab markets. Gaming payment and player data.
